title: Hello, world — welcome to the blog
description: The first post on a site built and published entirely from GitHub.
excerpt: Kicking things off: why this blog exists and how it's published without touching a line of code.
author: Pagewright

props.html:
Welcome! This is the very first post on a blog that was created, edited, and published without writing any code. Every word here lives as content in a GitHub repository, and a GitHub Actions workflow builds and deploys the site to GitHub Pages automatically.

What to expect

Short notes, longer essays, and the occasional behind-the-scenes look at how things are made. Posts can be drafted privately and scheduled to publish later — all handled for you.

Thanks for reading, and welcome aboard.
